title: Buttery Crunchy Farfalle Stir-fry
description: A vegan-friendly solo-dinner Chinese dish featuring farfalle pasta with a blend of buttery and crunchy textures.
instructions: Rinse farfalle pasta and cook according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat sesame oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add chopped garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add water chestnuts, dried mushrooms (if using), and snow peas; stir-fry for an additional minute.
Return cooked farfalle pasta to the pan with sauce ingredients, adding soy sauce gradually while stirring constantly. Let it cook for another 2-3 minutes or until well combined and heated through.
Stir in green onions just before serving to prevent browning. Serve hot.
Note: Garnish with fresh cilantro leaves if desired.
